description_long: This object is a pair of sheer white curtains suspended from a dark wooden or metal rod. The curtains are lightweight and semi-transparent, allowing light to filter through while still providing some privacy. The fabric hangs in gentle, natural folds, with a slight gap in the center, suggesting they are partially open. The top edge of the curtains is neatly finished and appears to be attached directly to the rod, likely via a rod pocket or sewn-in loops. The rod itself is straight and robust, contrasting with the delicate appearance of the fabric. The overall design is minimalistic and modern, suitable for residential windows in urban homes or apartments.
description: A pair of sheer white curtains hanging from a dark rod, partially open and softly draped. The design is minimalistic and modern, with a semi-transparent fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing both curtain panels hanging from the rod, with a visible gap in the center.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the curtain panels and the rod, with the fabric's folds visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the curtains' drape and the rod, with the gap in the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile of the curtains and the rod.
